request: The CI/CD pipeline service account github-actions@platform.iam.gserviceaccount.com needs to deploy Cloud Run services in the staging project web-staging. It should be able to run the deployed services as the runtime service account web-runtime@web-staging.iam.gserviceaccount.com.

condition.title: Only the web runtime SA
condition.description: Narrow serviceAccountUser so CI can only run the web runtime SA, not every SA in the project

rationale.reason: push new revisions to existing services
required to set the runtime SA on a Cloud Run service (pinned to one SA via CEL)

alternatives: Restrict further with an additional condition: resource.service == 'run.googleapis.com'
Pin to specific service names with resource.name.startsWith(...)
